summary: Comprehensive testing of ALPHA DROP iteration 6 features completed successfully. All 15 features tested: TikTok Affiliates system, Historical data tracking with daily snapshots, REST API access for Predator subscribers, Team collaboration, Google Trends integration, Amazon demand estimation. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly including admin panel, pricing page, and navigation.
passed_tests: POST /api/history/snapshot with invalid API key returns 401
POST /api/history/snapshot?api_key=alpha-drop-cron-2024 takes a daily snapshot successfully
GET /api/v1/products returns 401 with invalid API key
POST /api/admin/login with correct credentials returns JWT token
Admin login with correct credentials shows dashboard
Admin dashboard shows Total Products, Explosive, Active Subscribers, Total Revenue stats
Navigation bar includes Affiliates link (visible in Layout.jsx for logged-in users)
Pricing page shows Predator $499/month with REST API access, Team seats, Full affiliate tools
Pricing page shows Affiliate Pro +$99/mo add-on
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 adds modular route files under /app/backend/routes/ for affiliates, history, api_access, team, and trends. All new endpoints require subscription auth except history/snapshot (cron key) and v1/* (API key). The affiliates page is at /affiliates and redirects non-subscribers to /pricing. Admin panel at /admin still works from iteration 5. Pricing is $79/$199/$499 + $99 affiliate add-on. Predator plan includes REST API access, Team seats (3), Google Trends data, and Historical tracking features.
